Guangdong / Hong Kong Style / Seafood / Cooked Food Center
It is a Chinese court themed hot pot restaurant. It provides Chinese court dress for customers to take pictures and

This cart noodles restaurant provides many different choices for the ingredients, with low price. Remember to add
the satay sauce and their homemade sauce on top of the noodles before eating.

try dishes include Shrimp Roe, Jook Sing and Beef Stomach, and

clear broth and Beef Curry Noodles. This restaurant almost always has a long line so try to visit during non peak
Kam's Roast Goose is a Guangdong
style restaurant that specialises in serving variations of Chinese BBQ meats.
Their signature dish, roast goose, can be paired with soup noodles, rice and other food items.
Kam Wah serves in the speed of light, since their signature dishes are the Pineapple bun and eggtarts are that
popular, it is obvious hat the staff need to be on top form.

Hong Kong Style / Chinese BBQ / Tea Restaurant
G/F, 25 Yik Yam Street, Happy Valley
Pang's Kitchen is renowned for different styles of stir
fry dishes, especially the ginger and lettuce fish belly pot,
famous for its strong taste and ingredients.
Guangdong / Noodles/Rice Noodles / Tea Restaurant / Salt & Sugar Reduction Restaurant

號好順利大廈一座地下
This hot pot restaurant's decoration is classic. It mixes maw and chicken together for the soup base. It offers variety
of seafood, leatballs and beans products.
Apart from different kinds of Chinese dishes, this restaurant also provides a variety of chicken pot, such as coconut
chicken, Chongqing chicken, and Shaoxing Wine chicken pot.
Guangdong / Hong Kong Style / Hot Pot

66 Shui Che Kwun Street, Yuen Long
This snack shop is opened in Yuen Long and popular among the neighbours there. They are famous for their egg
sandwiches, which add parma ham, crab meat, etc. into the fried eggs and make it become special from other
Hong Kong Style / Sandwich / Snack Shop & Deli
A comfortable Japanese wooden decorated restaurant. It provides lots of Japanese dishes from side dishes, skewers
and fired to the shabu shabu. The Hiroshima oyster pot is famous and the taste of Japanese miso is rich.
11/F, CTMA Centre, 1N Sai Yeung Choi Street South, Mong Kok
It is famous for its fried chicken, which is imported from Korea directly. And the sauce is made from the Jeju
vegetables and twenty types of natural ingredients.
Shop UG09, UG/F, Olympian City 2, 18 Hoi Ting Road, Tai Kok Tsui
It mainly offers Singaporean cuisine, and crossover with the style of Malaysia, Thailand and Indonesia, to make the
traditional food in a modern way.

It is a Parisian bistro theme restaurant chain. The menu is diverse. It offers home
inspired by traditional French recipes and Asian elements.
Wang On Road, Fortress Hill, North Point
「魚事者」猶如一位魚品魔術師，為傳統魚品注入嶄新元素、以創新手法製作出多元化的魚品輕食。
International / Food Stall Noodles / Noodles/ Rice Noodles
155 Pak Tai Street, To Kwa Wan
Located in To Kwa Wan, the restaurant has a bar that serves red wine, white wine and various cocktails. It uses
national ingredients and innovative recipe to cook.
